metadata.name: Ukiyo-e Generative Art Dataset
metadata.description: A curated, tag-driven dataset for procedurally assembling historically-informed traditional Japanese ukiyo-e-style artwork concepts. Built for combinatorial prompt generation rather than direct historical reproduction.
metadata.createdFor: AI artwork concept and prompt generation for a printable wall-art pipeline
metadata.disclaimer: This dataset is historically informed and visually inspired by Japanese woodblock print traditions. It does not claim that generated concepts are historically authentic reproductions, and folklore entries are presented as folklore, not as confirmed fact.

globalStyles.label: Late Edo landscape print
globalStyles.promptText: Rendered as a late Edo-period landscape woodblock print, with confident black outlines and flat layered colour.
globalStyles.colorBehavior: flat layered fields with graded skies

globalStyles.label: Restrained bird-and-flower print
globalStyles.promptText: Rendered as a restrained kachō-e bird-and-flower print, with close observation and quiet negative space.

globalStyles.label: Bold narrative energy
globalStyles.promptText: Rendered with bold narrative energy in the manner of dramatic Edo-period warrior prints, without copying any specific composition.
globalStyles.textureBehavior: dynamic carved texture in motion areas

globalStyles.label: Lyrical atmospheric landscape
globalStyles.promptText: Rendered as a lyrical, atmospheric landscape print with soft gradation and quiet depth, inspired broadly by Edo travel-print traditions.

globalStyles.label: Delicate botanical woodblock treatment
globalStyles.promptText: Rendered as a delicate botanical woodblock study, precise and quietly observant.

globalStyles.label: Aizuri-e monochrome print
globalStyles.promptText: Rendered entirely in graded blue monochrome, in the aizuri-e printing tradition.

globalStyles.label: Early Meiji dramatic light
globalStyles.promptText: Rendered with the dramatic light and deeper shadow of early Meiji-period woodblock prints.

globalStyles.label: Early shin-hanga atmospheric depth
globalStyles.promptText: Rendered with the atmospheric depth and soft realism of early shin-hanga prints.

globalStyles.label: Hand-carved folk woodblock character
globalStyles.promptText: Rendered with the rougher, hand-carved character of rural folk woodblock printing.
